name: tia-plc-operations
description: Routed by tia-openness-roadmap. C# Openness implementation of PLC software engineering: program blocks, system blocks, PLC tags and tag tables, user data types, external sources, watch and force tables, technology objects, software units, know-how protection, SafetyAdministration, PLC online/offline control, download, upload, compare-to-online, PLC compile, PLC import/export, master secret, and certificate/security services.
